code-scanner.description: Scans and analyzes code using LocalAI small models. Bulk file processing, class identification.

architect.description: System design and architecture using LocalAI medium or Modal remote models.

trainer.description: Fine-tuning orchestration with LocalAI and Modal.

scan.description: Scan codebase files for classes, interfaces, structs, enums using LocalAI
scan.template: Scan the provided files/directories and identify all class, interface, struct, and enum declarations. $ARGUMENTS

remember.description: Store a fact in long-term memory
remember.template: Add this to long-term memory: $ARGUMENTS. Update .opencode/memory/long-term.json facts array with a new entry {id, timestamp, fact, category}.

infra.description: Snapshot Docker infrastructure state into long-term memory
infra.template: Run bash .opencode/scripts/infra-snapshot.sh and report the current container states.

ps.description: List running Docker containers with ports and status
ps.template: Run docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Ports}}\t{{.Status}}' and show results.
